home.subtitle: Test your geography knowledge

features.flagsDesc: Identify flags from countries around the world
features.mapsDesc: Locate cities and capitals on the map

home.quickTrustLine: No intrusive ads · quick rounds · mobile-first experience
home.welcomeBack: Welcome back, {{name}}! Your next match is one tap away.

auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.completeFieldsHint: Complete email and password to continue.
auth.rateLimitError: Too many attempts. Try again in {{minutes}} min.

menu.dailyChallengeDesc: 10 questions · same for everyone · one attempt
menu.singlePlayerDesc: Play alone and improve your score
menu.duelDesc: Compete in real-time against another player
menu.streakDesc: Keep going until you miss and beat your best
menu.rankingsDesc: See the global top and your position
menu.categoryHelper: Pick how you want to practice today. You can change this category anytime.
menu.quickActionsHelper: If you prefer, jump straight to your stats or the global ranking.
menu.welcomeExplore: Hi {{name}}! What shall we explore today?
menu.modeHelper: Then choose your pace: quick, competitive, or calm practice.
menu.flashNoMap: Flash mode does not support maps — pick another category
menu.survivalDesc: 1 life · progressive difficulty · last one standing wins

survival.title: Survival
survival.subtitle: Are you the last one standing?
survival.ruleOneLive: You start with 2 lives. One wrong answer takes 1 away.
survival.ruleDifficulty: Questions 1-5 Easy, 6-10 Medium, 11+ Hard. Timer gets shorter.
survival.ruleStreak: 4 correct in a row = +1 life (max 4). Streak doesn't reset when you earn a life.
survival.ruleWin: The last player with a life wins.
survival.youEliminated: You were eliminated. Watch how it ends.
survival.cancelledNotEnoughPlayers: Match cancelled due to not enough players

game.confirmExit: Are you sure you want to exit? You will lose your progress.
game.questionFlag: Which country does this flag belong to?
game.questionSilhouette: What country does this silhouette represent?
game.questionMonumentCountry: In which country is this monument?
game.questionMovieSceneCountry: In which country was this {{movie}} scene filmed?
game.questionMovieSceneCity: In which city was this {{movie}} scene filmed?
game.clickMap: Click on the map to select the location
game.streakBroken: Streak over! This was the correct answer.
game.selectionReadyHint: Option selected. Press Submit to check your answer.
game.tapNextHint: Answer saved. Press Next to continue.
game.tapResultsHint: Answer saved. Press See Results to finish.
game.selectOnMapHint: Pick a location on the map to continue.
game.lowTimeHint: {{seconds}} seconds left. Take a breath and confirm your answer.
game.shortGameConfirm: Only {{available}} questions are available (out of {{requested}} requested). Do you want to play anyway?
game.shortGameCancelled: Game cancelled. Try another category or setup to get more questions.

results.shareText: 🎯 I just finished a GeoChallenge round with {{score}} points ({{correct}}/{{total}} correct, {{accuracy}} accuracy). Think you can beat me?
results.pointsBreakdownTitle: What gave you the most points

duel.averageWaitHint: This usually takes under 30 seconds. Thanks for waiting.
duel.cancelHint: If you change your mind, you can cancel without losing progress.
duel.errorGeneric: We couldn't continue the duel. Please try again.
duel.reconnectedSyncing: Connection restored. Syncing the current round...
duel.searchTimeout: No opponent found. Try again later.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.createMultiplayerHint: Set categories, player limit and answer time in seconds.
challenges.confirmDecline: Are you sure you want to decline this challenge?
challenges.alreadyPlayedDesc: Wait for your opponent to complete the challenge
challenges.fetchError: Failed to load challenges. Please try again.
challenges.categoriesHint: Choose one or more categories for this group duel.
challenges.maxPlayersHint: Select how many people can join (including you).
challenges.answerTimeHint: Set the maximum time to answer each question.
challenges.fullLobby: Challenge is closed for new players
challenges.resultsSubtitle: Summary of your match. You can now go back to the list and keep competing.
challenges.resultsUnavailable: We could not find this challenge results. Go back to the list to continue.

rankings.title: Global Rankings
rankings.empty: No players in the rankings yet
rankings.noSearchResults: No results found for this search

profile.title: My Profile
profile.hapticsDescription: Vibration on taps, hits and misses

daily.comeBackTomorrow: Come back tomorrow for the next challenge

install.title: Install GeoChallenge
install.hint: Add it to your home screen for faster, browser-free play.
install.iosHint: Tap Share → Add to Home Screen in Safari.

offline.queued: Result saved. It will sync when you're back online.

flash.title: Flash
flash.intro: 60 seconds. Flags and silhouettes. Tap or swipe. Chain hits to multiply up to x10.
flash.ruleSwipe: Swipe left/right or tap the option
flash.swipeHint: Swipe ← or → · or tap an option
flash.ruleCombo: Combo x1 → x2 → x3 → x5 → x8 → x10
flash.ruleMiss: A miss resets the combo, the round continues

mechanics.streakShieldTriggered: Shield triggered: streak continues, but this round scores 0.

duelHistory.title: Duel History
duelHistory.noOpponents: You haven't played any duels yet

gameHistory.title: Your games
gameHistory.empty: You haven't played any games yet

filters.title: Filter questions
filters.unavailableCombination: This filter combination does not have enough questions (minimum {{required}}).
